proof:
calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
      exact le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by simp [sq, abs_mul]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by nlinarith [hy', abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
failed_attempts:
calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_mul, abs_pow, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by gcongr; exact hy'; exact hy'
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply add_le_add
      · apply add_le_add le_rfl
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy' (abs_nonneg x)
      · apply pow_le_pow_left (abs_nonneg y) hy' 2
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
  _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by gcongr <;> exact hy'
  _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x|^2 + |x| * |y| + |y|^2 := by simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x|^2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1)^2 := by nlinarith [hy', abs_nonneg x]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_mul, abs_pow, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by nlinarith [hy', abs_nonneg x]

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_mul, abs_pow, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply add_le_add
      · apply add_le_add (le_refl _)
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy' (abs_nonneg x)
      · apply pow_le_pow_left (abs_nonneg y) hy' 2
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
      exact le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply add_le_add
      · apply add_le_add le_rfl
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy' (abs_nonneg _)
      · apply pow_le_pow_left (abs_nonneg _) hy' _
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_mul, abs_pow, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by nlinarith [hy']

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      (abs_add _ _).trans (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by nlinarith [hy']

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by
      rw [← abs_pow, ← abs_mul, ← abs_pow]
      exact le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_left (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by gcongr
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by
      rw [← abs_pow, ← abs_mul, ← abs_pow]
      refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      refine add_le_add (add_le_add le_rfl ?_) ?_
      · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy' (abs_nonneg _)
      · exact pow_le_pow_left (abs_nonneg _) hy' 2
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_left (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by gcongr <;> apply hy'
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_pow, abs_mul]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [hy', abs_nonneg x]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| :=
      le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by nlinarith [hy', abs_nonneg x]

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by
      rw [← abs_pow, ← abs_mul, ← abs_pow]
      exact le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply add_le_add (add_le_add (le_refl _) _) _
      · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy' (abs_nonneg x)
      · exact pow_le_pow_left (abs_nonneg y) hy' 2
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
      refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply add_le_add
      · apply add_le_add (le_refl _)
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy' (abs_nonneg _)
      · apply pow_le_pow_left (abs_nonneg _) hy' _
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x|^2 + |x| * |y| + |y|^2 := by

      simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x|^2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1)^2 := by
      gcongr <;> apply hy'
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc

    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]

    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc
    |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := le_trans (abs_add_le _ _) (add_le_add_right (abs_add_le _ _) _)
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by simp [abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply add_le_add
      · apply add_le_add_left
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy' (abs_nonneg _)
      · exact pow_le_pow_left (abs_nonneg _) hy' 2
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring
